author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.2.0
body: # [5.2.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.2.0-beta.2...v5.2.0) (2018-07-04) ### Bug Fixes * **translatable:** avoid create a new function on every render ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1383](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1383)) ([8cb37fd](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/8cb37fd)) ### Features * **core:** export translatable ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1351](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1351)) ([1dad74f](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/1dad74f)) * **maps:** add connector & widget ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1171](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1171)) ([0e1810a](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0e1810a)), closes [#1189](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1189) [#1192](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1192) [#1201](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1201) [#1205](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1205) [#1207](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1207) [#1214](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1214) [#1227](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1227) [#1236](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1236) [#1289](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1289)
